g.title: pipeline
g.text: content-address, walk the tree in jails, validate at the broker, fold fail-closed; the AI enriches but never disposes

g.title: cluster_control
g.text: (trusted; never executes or parses hostile bytes in-process)

g.title: cluster_jail
g.text: (network none, all caps dropped, read-only root, non-root 65534, seccomp, bounded)

g.title: cluster_ai
g.text: (isolated, no egress, untrusted; off unless a model is wired)

g.title: CON
g.text: ranked queue, recursive evidence tree, defanged

g.title: AG
g.text: see agentic-plane.dot for the full plane

g.title: BR
g.text: strict JSON, unknown-field reject, hard size caps
the ONE and ONLY decode path for worker output
